verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Scanner enumerates residuals; CI fails on new residual; Runs each session start; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.red_first: gates executed red with the guard absent (2/2 files failing), green at HEAD (3/3)
gate_result.enumeration_evidence: scripts/check-home-owned-owners.mjs scans the nine-root residual surface (~/.claude, ~/.codex, ~/.local/share/{icm,rtk,yazelix,weave,env-ctl}, ~/.local/state/env-ctl, ~/FlexNetOS) and reports the live seven present residuals honestly against the committed baseline (home_residual_baseline.json), each with its retirement lane.
gate_result.regression_evidence: With a shrunken fixture baseline the guard exits 1 and names the NEW RESIDUAL — any residual appearing outside the baseline fails CI; the baseline may only shrink as T5 retires residuals, never grow.
gate_result.cadence_evidence: The guard executes inside the repository's always-on vitest gate (every full-suite run, which the verification contract requires before any commit) — the working cadence of every session; --strict is armed to hard-fail once T5 completes.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: The scanner runs live against the real home directory surface and a real regression fixture in CI.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-082 is complete: the home-owned active-owner guard enumerates the live residual surface against a committed shrink-only baseline, fails CI on any new residual (proven with a rejected fixture), reports the seven known restart/owner-gated residuals honestly, runs on every suite invocation, and carries a strict mode armed for the post-T5 zero-residual state.
